Package subscriberGui

Class SubscriberDashboardController

java.lang.Object
subscriberGui.SubscriberDashboardController
public class SubscriberDashboardController extends Object
Controller for the subscriber dashboard. Handles display of parking history and navigation between screens.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    SubscriberDashboardController()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ActionEvent
    getLastEvent()
    Returns the last ActionEvent that triggered a reservation or deposit request.
    void
    initialize()
    Initializes the dashboard controller by loading the subscriber's parking history.
    void
    openReservationWindow(ActionEvent event)
    Opens the reservation window after the server confirms availability.
    void
    refreshParkingHistory()
    Requests the latest parking history from the server for the current subscriber using ClientRequest.
    void
    setClient(ClientController client)
    Injects the active client controller into this controller.
    void
    setLastEvent(ActionEvent lastEvent)
    Stores the ActionEvent that triggered a reservation or deposit request.
    void
    setParkingHistoryData(ObservableList<entities.ParkingHistory> history)
    Populates the parking history TableView and updates the current parking session labels.

  • Constructor Details

    • SubscriberDashboardController

      public SubscriberDashboardController()

  • Method Details

    • setClient

      public void setClient(ClientController client)
      Injects the active client controller into this controller.
      Parameters:
      client - The active ClientController instance.

    • openReservationWindow

      public void openReservationWindow(ActionEvent event)
      Opens the reservation window after the server confirms availability. Called by ClientController when the server response is positive.
      Parameters:
      event - The ActionEvent that originally triggered the reservation attempt.

    • setParkingHistoryData

      public void setParkingHistoryData(ObservableList<entities.ParkingHistory> history)
      Populates the parking history TableView and updates the current parking session labels.
      Parameters:
      history - the list of ParkingHistory objects to display

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes the dashboard controller by loading the subscriber's parking history. Also refreshes when the window regains focus.

    • refreshParkingHistory

      public void refreshParkingHistory()
      Requests the latest parking history from the server for the current subscriber using ClientRequest.

    • getLastEvent

      public ActionEvent getLastEvent()
      Returns the last ActionEvent that triggered a reservation or deposit request.
      Returns:
      the last ActionEvent

    • setLastEvent

      public void setLastEvent(ActionEvent lastEvent)
      Stores the ActionEvent that triggered a reservation or deposit request.
      Parameters:
      lastEvent - the triggering ActionEvent
